usage: Login page main shield independent screenshot icon; cropped to shield body and inner 中 emblem only.

source.mask: tight polygon alpha mask follows shield outline; outer hologram rings, ground light, buildings, form, panel and page background are removed
source.policy: independent icon/emblem only; target PNG remains evidence-only and is not served from public assets
